articles.title: Murdered student did not die with dignity, says family, as bodycam footage shows him being handcuffed
articles.description: The family of murdered student Henry Nowak say knife crime should be treated as a "national emergency".

articles.title: Massive Russian attack on cities across Ukraine kills at least 13 people
articles.description: Rescuers are racing to find people feared trapped beneath rubble after the overnight missile and drone attack.

articles.title: Clashes continue in Lebanon despite Israel and Hezbollah accepting US partial ceasefire plan
articles.description: A cessation of hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah is seen as crucial to the peace process with Iran.

articles.title: Southampton owner will not sack head coach after club spied on rival teams
articles.description: Southampton owner Dragan Solak tells BBC Sport he will not sack Tonda Eckert, despite the "mistake" the head coach made when authorising a spying campaign against rival Championship clubs.
